title: oxycoccus intermedius
intro: Oxycoccus intermedius, also known as the intermediate cranberry, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oxycoccus intermedius include its ability to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Oxycoccus intermedius include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
